context: Evaluating a Coralogix support response for: Our Windows host in K8s is running coralogixrepo/opentelemetry-collector-contrib-windows:0.92.0 (from the otel-integrati

checklist.name: no-claims-windows-doesn-t-support-opamp-at-al
checklist.description: Says the pinned 0.92.0 Windows image is too old for the `opamp` extension and recommends either bumping the image to a current Windows build that includes `opamp`, OR using the `-Supervisor` wrapper (opampsupervisor as a separate Windows service). A response that claims Windows doesn't support OpAMP at all is a FAIL — modern Windows builds do support it.
